PIPELINE_COMPLEX.description: Multi-stage pipeline that could not be fully converted to LINQ

DB2_CONNECTION.description: ODBC/DSN-based DB2 connection that needs IBM.Data.Db2 conversion

PROCESS_INVOCATION.description: Complex process/script invocation that needs manual review

TYPE_COERCION.description: PowerShell implicit type coercion that needs explicit C# handling

UNHANDLED_CMDLET.description: Cmdlet with no mapping in CmdletMappings.json

UNHANDLED_AST.description: AST node type not supported by the mechanical converter
